hero.headline: Your teams already share an office.
hero.headlineEm: What if they shared the road?
hero.subline: Cowat organizes carpooling within your organization. Your colleagues post their commutes, you book a seat — that's it.

post.title: Post your commute
post.description: Enter where you leave from, where you're going and when. Cowat finds colleagues on your route.

book.title: Book a seat
book.description: A colleague takes the same route? Book in one click. No negotiation, no calls.

ride.title: Ride together
ride.description: Fewer cars in the parking lot, more conversations on the road. The habit catches on fast.

access.title: Available by invitation
access.text: Cowat is built for companies, associations and collectives.
access.textAfter: to bring your organization on board.

story.title: Why we built Cowat
story.paragraph1: At BearStudio, we had a dead-simple problem: not enough parking spots, and every morning we'd realize we were all driving the same route in separate cars.
story.paragraph2: Rather than live with it, we built the tool we wanted to use ourselves. No noise, no unnecessary features — just a simple way to say "I'm heading that way tomorrow, who's in?".
story.paragraph3: It worked for us. So we opened it up to any organization with the same problem.
